---
title: "Events"
subtitle: "Equestrian events at Silver Spurs"
format:
  html:
    include-after-body: ../_footer.html
---

### All Events

Browse past and upcoming events. Click column headers to sort by date, event name, location, or type.

<div id="events-app">

<div class="events-controls">
  <label>Event Type:
    <select id="events-type-filter">
      <option value="">All types</option>
    </select>
  </label>
  <label>Status:
    <select id="events-status-filter">
      <option value="">All</option>
      <option value="upcoming">Upcoming</option>
      <option value="past">Past</option>
    </select>
  </label>
</div>

<div id="events-summary">Loading events…</div>
<div id="events-table"></div>

</div>

<script id="events-data" type="application/json">
{{< include ../data/events.json >}}
</script>
<script src="../scripts/events.js?v=20260605"></script>

<style>
.events-controls {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.events-controls label {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  align-items: center;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.events-controls select {
  padding: 0.5rem;
  border: 2px solid #691C32;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  background-color: white;
}

.events-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.events-table th,
.events-table td {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  padding: 0.75rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.events-table th {
  background: #691C32;
  color: white;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
}

.events-table th.sortable:hover {
  background: #8B2541;
}

.events-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) {
  background: #f9f9f9;
}

.events-table tbody tr.event-past {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.date-cell {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.event-type-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
  background: #E8D5CE;
  color: #691C32;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.status-cell {
  text-align: center;
}

.status-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.status-badge.status-upcoming {
  background: #C8E6C9;
  color: #2E7D32;
}

.status-badge.status-past {
  background: #F0F0F0;
  color: #666;
}

.actions-cell {
  text-align: center;
}

.event-action-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
  background: #B8573E;
  color: white;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}

.event-action-link:hover {
  background: #932F1D;
}

.no-results {
  color: #999;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.sort-indicator {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  margin-left: 0.25rem;
}

#events-summary {
  padding: 0.75rem;
  background: #F5F5F5;
  border-radius: 4px;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
}
</style>
